title: Auto Replace
description: Auto-replacing blocks in your main-hand or off-hand while breaking the block!
body:
With this mod, if you have blocks at your main-hand or off-hand and break the blocks, it will replace the blocks automaticly.

This action is possible with few conditions:

-If you have blocks at your main-hand and break any block with your main-hand, it will automaticly replace the block at your main-hand.

-If you have blocks at your off-hand and have pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, at your main-hand or empty main-hand,
it will automaticly replace the block at your off-hand(If you have any other item at your main-hand, this action will not work!).



Also you can disable this feature at the Game Rules menu(Disable Auto Replace), or /gamerule command(disableAutoReplace, default is false).
